bmcmod.commands.dimension.players_only: This command can only be used by players.
bmcmod.commands.dimension.already_here: You are already in this dimension.
bmcmod.commands.givehead.console_needs_t: From the console, use: /givehead <name> <targets> (e.g. @p or PlayerName).
bmcmod.commands.help.title: Better Minecraft — custom commands
bmcmod.commands.help.intro: Players first, then mob type or @e template. Pages: /bmc 2 … Also /bmc help, /bmc book.
bmcmod.commands.help.givehead: /givehead <name> [targets] — Player head (Mojang skin). Perm. 2. Console needs targets.
bmcmod.commands.help.metamorph: /metamorph set <players> <type|@e…> — e.g. set @p pig, set @a minecraft:zombie, set @p @e[type=cow,limit=1]. reset [players]. Perm. 4.
bmcmod.commands.help.undeadinvasion: /bmc undeadinvasion <play|start|stop|get|status|end|back|victoryloot|spawn> — play/start/stop/get/status/end/back as before; victoryloot [level 1–6] spawns the victory reward chest (random tier if omitted); spawn <kind> <level 1–6> [wave] spawns one debug mob (boss, brute, captain, grunt_random, …).
bmcmod.commands.help.quest: /bmc quest give <easy|normal|hard|extreme> <minutes 1–480> [targets] — Quest Log with a random quest (type + goal). Time = limit after the quest starts. Aliases: facile, moyen, difficile, extrême. Perm. 2. Console: add targets.
bmcmod.commands.help.crystal: /bmc crystal set <count> | add <count> | remove <count> | clear — hold the infusion soul crystal (main or off hand). Perm 2.
bmcmod.commands.crystal.players_only: This command can only be used by players in-game.
bmcmod.commands.crystal.no_crystal: Hold the infusion soul crystal in your main or off hand.
bmcmod.commands.crystal.success_set: Soul total set to %s — crystal holds %s now.
bmcmod.commands.crystal.success_remove: Requested removal of %s souls — total now %s.
bmcmod.commands.quest.give.bad_difficult: Unknown difficulty "%s". Use: easy, normal, hard, extreme (or facile, moyen, difficile, extrême).
bmcmod.commands.quest.give.console_needs: From the console use: /bmc quest give <difficulty> <minutes> <targets> (players selector required).
bmcmod.commands.quest.give.success: Gave %s quest log(s): %s — %s min after the quest starts.
bmcmod.commands.metamorph.not_living_ent: %s is not a living mob (use a creature, e.g. @e[type=minecraft:bee,limit=1]).
bmcmod.commands.metamorph.no_player_mob: The morph template cannot be a player — pick another entity with @e.
bmcmod.commands.metamorph.no_player_sele: Use a mob selector here (@e, @n, or UUID), not @a / @p / @r or a player name. If you used @s as a player, you selected yourself — use @e[type=...,limit=1,sort=nearest] instead.
bmcmod.commands.metamorph.boss_blocked: This boss cannot be used for metamorphosis.
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.play_succ: Started undead invasion level %s for %s player(s).
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.start_suc: Started undead invasion immediately at level %s for %s.
Started undead invasion immediately at level %s for %s player(s).
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.none: No active undead invasion to stop.
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.end_faile: Cannot end wave now (no active wave).
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.back_succ: Moved %s player(s) back by one wave.
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.back_fail: Cannot go back now (no invasion active).
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.spawn_suc: Spawned debug mob "%s" (invasion level %s, simulated wave %s).
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.spawn_unk: Unknown spawn kind "%s". Use tab completion for valid names.
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.spawn_fai: Could not spawn (must run as a player in a server level).
bmcmod.commands.undeadinvasion.victorylo: Spawned undead invasion victory chest (loot tier %s).
bmcmod.commands.curedwitch.spawn_failed: Failed to spawn Cured Witch villager.
bmcmod.commands.help.nether: /nether — Teleports you to the Nether at the same X/Y/Z and rotation (permission 4, players only).
bmcmod.commands.help.end: /end — Same as /nether but for the End (permission 4).
bmcmod.commands.help.overworld: /overworld — Same as /nether but for the Overworld (permission 4).
bmcmod.commands.help.eatevent: /bmc eatevent run — One feeder auto-feed pass in this dimension (ignores time windows; debug). Perm. 2.
bmcmod.commands.eatevent.run.success: Feeder eat pass: %s animal(s) fed (items consumed from feeders).
bmcmod.commands.eatevent.run.not_overwor: This command must run with an overworld-like server level.
bmcmod.commands.help.book.players_only: The book can only be given to a player (run in-game).
bmcmod.commands.help.book.received: You received the Better Minecraft command guide (written book).
bmcmod.commands.help.book.p1:
§6§lBetter Minecraft§r
§8STELLAR STUDIO§r

§0/givehead §8<name> [targets]§r
§7Head (skin). Perm. 2.

§0/metamorph set §8<players> <type|@e>§r
§7e.g. §oset @p pig§7, §oset @p @e[type=cow,limit=1]§7. Perm. 4.
bmcmod.commands.help.book.p2:
§0/metamorph set §8<players> <@e...>§r
§7Copy a mob in the world: §o@e[type=minecraft:zombie,limit=1,sort=nearest]§7.

§0/metamorph reset §8[players]§r
§7Clear morph.

§0/nether§r §7— same XYZ to the Nether (players, perm. 4).
bmcmod.commands.help.book.p3:
§0/end§r §7— same for the End.

§0/overworld§r §7— same for the Overworld.

§8/bmc§7 and §8/betterminecraft§7: paged help. §8/bmc book§7: this guide.
item.bmcmod.scythe.hint_whirlwind: Hold use (~2s) to arm Whirlwind, then attack a mob. Attacking while charging cancels it.
item.bmcmod.scythe.hint_ctrl_short: Ctrl + right-click: cycle area (up to tier max)
item.bmcmod.scythe.hint_ctrl_full: Ctrl + right-click: cycle area size (2×2 … max tier)
item.bmcmod.scythe.desc.iron: Entry scythe — till soil and harvest crops in up to 2×2.
item.bmcmod.scythe.desc.golden: Gilded blade — reaches 3×3 for faster fields.
item.bmcmod.scythe.desc.diamond: Sharp sweep — cover up to 4×4 per swing.
item.bmcmod.scythe.desc.emerald: Elite reach — work plots up to 5×5.
item.bmcmod.scythe.desc.netherite: Heavy-duty — strip and harvest up to 6×6.
bmcmod.melody_horn.subtitle: ♪ %s
bmcmod.melody_horn.tune.lotr_shire: The Lord of the Rings — Shire (inspired)
bmcmod.melody_horn.tune.good_bad_ugly: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly (inspired)
bmcmod.melody_horn.tune.lotr_rivendell: The Lord of the Rings — Rivendell (inspired)
item.bmcmod.echo_staff.usage: Hold use 5s, then release to unleash a sonic blast
message.bmcmod.echo_staff.ready: Echo Staff — charged! Release to fire
item.bmcmod.flame_staff.usage: Hold use: flamethrower in view direction; burning targets take bonus damage. Durability drains while firing.
item.bmcmod.ice_staff.usage: Mode 1: create a temporary frosted-ice bridge in your view direction. Mode 2: hold use to fire a freezing beam that slows targets. Mode 3: summon up to 3 enhanced snow golems (no pumpkin, bigger, tougher).
item.bmcmod.end_staff.usage: Mode 1: hold use, release to throw a charged pearl where you aim. Mode 2: use on a creature in your line of sight — damage + random teleport. Mode 3: random teleport yourself (enderman-style).
message.bmcmod.end_staff.pearl_cancelled: Release too early — pearl not thrown
item.bmcmod.dragon_staff.usage: Mode 1: hold use, release to launch a dragon fireball toward your aim. Mode 2: hold use — a breath beam damages creatures in your line of sight (dragon breath damage).
item.bmcmod.wither_staff.usage: Mode 1: fire a wither skull like the Wither. Mode 2: summon 3 allied wither skeletons in enchanted iron gear that defend you and hunt nearby monsters.
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.tier.gold: Tier: Gold — 13 shape modes, modest durability
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.tier.emerald: Tier: Emerald — 26 shape modes, large builds
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.tier.enderite: Tier: Enderite — 45 shape modes, top durability
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.line: Line: %s blocks (straight along the face you click)
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.plane: Solid plane: %s × %s on the clicked face
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.hollow_pla: Hollow frame: %s × %s (border only on that face)
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.cross: Cross: %s × %s (center row + column on that face)
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.corner: L-corner: %s along one edge + %s along the other from the corner
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.diagonal: Diagonal: %s blocks on the clicked face
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.mode.wall: Solid wall: %s wide × %s tall (vertical from the clicked edge)
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.block_none: No block selected — use sneak + Ctrl + right-click to cycle blocks from your inventory
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.hint_face: Right-click a block face — the wand builds in the air in front of that face. Green outline = will place; red = blocked.
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.hint_look: Planes, walls, crosses, etc. align to your view: the wide axis follows your look (flattened onto that face).
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.hint_placement_: Hold Ctrl and scroll the mouse wheel to rotate the placement in the plane of the face (4 steps) without moving your view.
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.controls: Ctrl + right-click: next shape · Ctrl + scroll: rotate placement · Sneak + Ctrl + right-click: pick block from inventory
item.bmcmod.builder_wand.usage: Uses block items from your inventory (creative ignores cost). Durability drops by 1 per block placed.
message.bmcmod.builder_wand.no_blocks_in: No placeable block items in inventory
message.bmcmod.builder_wand.no_block: Add block items to your inventory (or cycle material with sneak + Ctrl + right-click)
message.bmcmod.builder_wand.nothing_plac: Nothing placed (blocked positions or missing items)
item.bmcmod.back_totem.tip: Hold use briefly, then teleport to your spawn (bed or world spawn).
quest.bmcmod.time_starts_on_pickup: Timer starts when the log enters your inventory.
quest.bmcmod.tooltip.objective.coords_hi: - Coordinates hidden until the quest starts
quest.bmcmod.tooltip.objective.bounty_pe: - Eliminate your contracted target (not yet appeared)
quest.bmcmod.tooltip.bounty_spawn_in: - Target appears in about %s min %s s
quest.bmcmod.bounty_peaceful: Peaceful difficulty: bounty target could not spawn; contract cleared.
quest.bmcmod.tooltip.time_starts_line: - Timer starts when the log enters your inventory.
quest.bmcmod.time_expired: Time is up for this quest.
quest.bmcmod.reward.easy: Reward: 1–2 drops (emeralds, gold, iron, XP bottles, gold nuggets…)
quest.bmcmod.reward.normal: Reward: 2–3 drops (better ingot stacks, XP bottles, rubies…)
quest.bmcmod.reward.hard: Reward: 3–4 drops (diamond chance, rubies, large ingot stacks…)
quest.bmcmod.reward.extreme: Reward: 4–6 drops (diamonds, golden apple chance, rubies, top-tier rolls…)
quest.bmcmod.reward.special: Reward: 6–8 premium drops (enchanted golden apple chance, high ruby/diamond rolls, top-tier loot…)
quest.bmcmod.reward.bounty_hunter: Reward: premium drops plus a high chance of rare materials and invasion-tier loot.

message.bmcmod.undead_invasion.secret_wa: A dark omen lingers... a hidden 10th wave may awaken.
Secret Wave 10 begins — The Undead Boss has appeared!
message.bmcmod.undead_invasion.resumed: Undead Invasion resumed from where you left off.
message.bmcmod.undead_invasion.reward_ch: Reward chest spawned at: X %s Y %s Z %s

tooltip.bmcmod.upgrade.effect.frost_walk: Faster on ice, no powder snow sinking
tooltip.bmcmod.upgrade.effect.swim_upgra: Faster swim, breathing and underwater vision
tooltip.bmcmod.upgrade.effect.camouflage: While sneaking, hostile mobs won't target you (not bosses). Attacking or taking damage while standing reveals you briefly

item.bmcmod.super_bone.tooltip: Right-click your tamed wolf: major combat buffs for 10 minutes (stats, fire resistance, absorption). One use per wolf every 10 minutes.
message.bmcmod.super_bone.cooldown: This wolf can't eat another Super Bone yet (wait until the current buff ends).
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.bmcm: Splash Potion of Undead Invasion I
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.b: Lingering Potion of Undead Invasion I
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.bmcm: Splash Potion of Undead Invasion II
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.b: Lingering Potion of Undead Invasion II
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.bmcm: Splash Potion of Undead Invasion III
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.b: Lingering Potion of Undead Invasion III

item.bmcmod.smithing_template.enderite_u: Add a piece of Netherite gear (armor, tool, weapon, or shield).
item.bmcmod.smithing_template.boreal_upg: Add a piece of Enderite gear (armor or tool).
item.bmcmod.smithing_template.bow_upgrad: Add the required material for this tier.
item.bmcmod.smithing_template.staff_upgr: Add the catalyst item required by the recipe.
gui.bmcmod.upgrade_table.slot.shard: Place any geode shard (Nebrith, Topaz, Opal, Beryl)
gui.bmcmod.infusion.recipe_book.need_sou: Not enough souls in the crystal.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.recipe_book.need_ite: Missing ingredients in inventory or grid.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.recipe_book.output_b: Output slot cannot take this result.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.recipe_book.click_hi: Click to preview in the 2×2 grid.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.button.disabled.no_r: No matching recipe for the items in the grid.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.button.disabled.need: Place a soul crystal in the top slot.
Not enough souls in the crystal.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.button.disabled.outp: Clear or make room in the output slot.
gui.bmcmod.infusion.button.disabled.wait: Check the table state or try again in a moment.
item.bmcmod.crystal.empty: Holds no souls yet — keep it in your off-hand when you kill mobs.
item.bmcmod.morph_crystal.empty: No soul stored — kill a mob with this crystal in your off-hand.
item.bmcmod.morph_crystal.has_soul: A soul is stored — hold right-click (main or off-hand) to morph. The soul is consumed when you morph (kill again to store a new one).
item.bmcmod.morph_crystal.demorph_hint: While morphed: hold right-click with this crystal (5s) to return — morph lasts at most 8 min.
item.bmcmod.capture_crystal.summary.empt: Empty — hold Shift for how to capture.
item.bmcmod.capture_crystal.empty: Empty — hold right-click on a mob (main or off-hand) for 10s while keeping it in your crosshair.
item.bmcmod.capture_crystal.contains: Holds a creature — right-click a block with this in your main hand to release it.
item.bmcmod.capture_crystal.hint: Bosses and players cannot be captured. Canceling the channel applies a short cooldown.
message.bmcmod.capture_crystal.no_room: Not enough space here to release.
message.bmcmod.morph_crystal.shattered: Your Morph Crystal has shattered from strain.
message.bmcmod.morph_crystal.expired: Your metamorphosis has worn off (8 min limit).
hud.bmcmod.capture_crystal.post_capture_: Capture crystal — wait before placing: %s s
item.bmcmod.unknown_book.hint: Throw into Experience Liquid to reveal (70%). Or combine in an anvil (tool left, book right) for a random enchant — curses are more likely until revealed.
bmcmod.codex.entry.bleeding.title: Bleeding
bmcmod.codex.entry.bleeding.body: Levels I–III. Applies to swords, axes, and tridents. On a melee hit from the player, inflicts the custom Bleed effect; duration and amplifier scale with the enchantment level.
bmcmod.codex.entry.life_steal.title: Life Steal
bmcmod.codex.entry.life_steal.body: Levels I–III. Same melee weapons as Bleeding. After dealing damage, heals you for a fraction of damage dealt (about 7% / 10% / 13% at I / II / III).
bmcmod.codex.entry.timber.title: Timber
bmcmod.codex.entry.timber.body: Level I on axes only (not from the enchanting table — use loot or anvil). While not sneaking, breaking one log in a connected tree breaks up to 256 matching logs in one chain.
bmcmod.codex.entry.crushing_blow.title: Crushing Blow
bmcmod.codex.entry.crushing_blow.body: Levels I–III on axes. When you hit a living entity, applies Slowness; duration and strength scale with level.
bmcmod.codex.entry.fire_thorn.title: Fire Thorn
bmcmod.codex.entry.fire_thorn.body: Levels I–III on any armor piece. Incompatible with vanilla Thorns. When something damages you in melee, sets the attacker on fire longer at higher levels (stacks from multiple armor pieces).
bmcmod.codex.entry.explosive_shot.title: Explosive Shot
bmcmod.codex.entry.explosive_shot.body: Levels I–III on bows and crossbows (not from the enchanting table). Your arrows carry the tag on shot; on impact they explode with power growing per level, breaking blocks and damaging entities, then the arrow is discarded.
bmcmod.codex.entry.excavator.title: Excavator
bmcmod.codex.entry.excavator.body: Level I on pickaxes (not from the enchanting table). While not sneaking and with 3×3 mode enabled, breaking one mineable block breaks a 3×3 slice oriented by your facing and pitch. Toggle 3×3 off on the tool if you want single-block breaks. Shift breaks normally.
bmcmod.codex.entry.auto_smelt.title: Auto-Smelt
bmcmod.codex.entry.auto_smelt.body: Level I on pickaxes. Block drops are passed through furnace smelting recipes when possible. Incompatible with Silk Touch.
bmcmod.codex.entry.empathic_strike.title: Curse of Empathic Strike
bmcmod.codex.entry.empathic_strike.body: Curse (level I). Applies to swords, axes, tridents, pickaxes, shovels, and hoes (not from the table). Your direct melee damage to mobs is set to zero and the same amount is dealt to you instead — like the target struck back.
bmcmod.codex.entry.curse_of_launchstrike: Curse on crossbows only; incompatible with other crossbow enchantments. Firing launches you along the shot with nausea and poison; long crossbow cooldown and extra durability loss. Projectiles from other weapons are unaffected.
bmcmod.codex.entry.shield_charge.title: Shield Charge
bmcmod.codex.entry.shield_charge.body: Levels I–III on shields modded for enchanting. After a successful block against a living melee attacker, high chance of a strong knockback impulse; small independent chance of bonus attack damage.
bmcmod.codex.entry.whirlwind.title: Whirlwind
bmcmod.codex.entry.whirlwind.body: Level I on scythes only. During the charged sweep, aim at nothing to unleash the tornado strike instead of the cone sweep; costs extra durability. Mutually exclusive with Wide Sweep, Reaping, and Briar Ring.
bmcmod.codex.entry.wide_sweep.title: Wide Sweep
bmcmod.codex.entry.wide_sweep.body: Levels I–V on scythes. Increases effective radius of the special sweep attack (cone or tornado area). Mutually exclusive with Whirlwind.
bmcmod.codex.entry.reaping.title: Reaping
bmcmod.codex.entry.reaping.body: Levels I–V on scythes. When you harvest mature crops with the scythe’s farm mode, chance per harvest for many bonus drops rolled like the normal drops (Fortune still applies to the base harvest). Mutually exclusive with Whirlwind.
bmcmod.codex.entry.briar_ring.title: Briar Ring
bmcmod.codex.entry.briar_ring.body: Levels I–II on scythes. Sweep hits apply brief Weakness and particle effects; Whirlwind tornado hits also trigger briar effects and an extra ground ring. Mutually exclusive with Whirlwind.
hud.bmcmod.feeder.title: Feeder:
message.bmcmod.clone_death_chest: A clone fell — belongings placed in a nearby chest.
message.bmcmod.clone_death_inventory: Clone inventory dropped items at your feet.
advancement.bmcmod.root.title: Better Minecraft
advancement.bmcmod.root.description: Progression, invasions, End Storm, gear and secrets—explore every branch of the mod.
advancement.bmcmod.welcome_journey.title: A New Journey
advancement.bmcmod.welcome_journey.descr: Begin your tab: gear, alchemy, invasions, the End, builds and more.
advancement.bmcmod.soul_spark.title: Soul Spark
advancement.bmcmod.soul_spark.descriptio: Capture your first souls in a crystal.
advancement.bmcmod.infusion_adept.title: Emerald Vanguard

advancement.bmcmod.clone_commander.descr: Carry an Undead Totem and a Quest Log to command your path.

advancement.bmcmod.infusion_table_master: Craft and hold an Infusion Table.

advancement.bmcmod.hollow_homestead.desc: Build a proper Hollow wood workshop set.
advancement.bmcmod.liquid_scholar.title: Liquid Scholar
advancement.bmcmod.liquid_scholar.descri: Capture Experience Liquid in a bucket.

advancement.bmcmod.bottle_mastery.title: Undead Mastery

advancement.bmcmod.quest_writer.title: Quest Path

advancement.bmcmod.challenge_relic_trini: Carry the End, Dragon and Wither staffs together.
advancement.bmcmod.challenge_invasion_le: Carry the Undead Crown, Undead Bottle VI and an Undead Totem together—the full invasion legacy.

advancement.bmcmod.challenge_immortal_ki: Carry an Enchanted Diamond Apple, Boreal ingot and Undead Totem together.
advancement.bmcmod.storm_scout.title: Eye of the Storm

advancement.bmcmod.storm_seer.descriptio: Reach End Storm Bottle III as the rift deepens.
advancement.bmcmod.storm_cataclysm.title: Cataclysm in a Bottle
advancement.bmcmod.storm_cataclysm.descr: Claim End Storm Bottle IV before the sky breaks.
advancement.bmcmod.storm_bannerlord.desc: Take the End Storm Banner from the storm’s champions.
advancement.bmcmod.undead_elixir_one.des: Obtain your first Undead bottle—step one of the blight alchemy line.
advancement.bmcmod.invasion_herald.title: Invasion Herald
advancement.bmcmod.invasion_herald.descr: Carry the Undead Invasion banner won from the horde’s captains.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_blink.title: Unring the Rift
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_blink.descriptio: Slay a Blink—an End rift warden.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_endling.title: Ling Fracture
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_endling.descript: Defeat an Endling from the End Storm legions.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_end_golem.title: Titan of the Rift
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_end_golem.descri: Defeat the End Golem that anchors the tempest’s boss waves.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_void_heart.title: Heart of the Rift
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_void_heart.descr: Claim an End Golem heart after shattering the colossus.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_undead_illager.d: Kill an Undead Illager leading the invasion.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_radiant_slime.de: Destroy a Radiant Slime in combat.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_skeleton_village: Put down a Skeleton Villager risen from the invasion.
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_vlinx.title: Threadbare Hunter
advancement.bmcmod.hunt_vlinx.descriptio: Kill a Vlinx skittering through the world.
advancement.bmcmod.armor_copper_full.des: Wear a full set of copper armor from the upgrade path.
advancement.bmcmod.tools_emerald_pair.de: Forge an emerald sword and pickaxe.
advancement.bmcmod.tools_enderite_pair.d: Forge an enderite sword and pickaxe to match your armor.
advancement.bmcmod.armor_shulker_full.de: Wear the complete shulker armor set.
advancement.bmcmod.boots_sky.title: Sky Strider
advancement.bmcmod.boots_sky.description: Equip Sky Boots and taste weightless steps.
advancement.bmcmod.void_shard_bound.desc: Hold a Void Shard—the weapon of Nebrith-age hunters.
advancement.bmcmod.staff_inferno.title: Inferno Covenant
advancement.bmcmod.staff_inferno.descrip: Wield the Flame Staff after claiming the End Staff path.
advancement.bmcmod.bow_thunder.title: Stormdraw
advancement.bmcmod.builder_wand_enderite: Craft the enderite Builder Wand—ultimate placement power.
advancement.bmcmod.taste_golden_berry.de: Taste a Golden Berry from the mod’s orchards.
advancement.bmcmod.ruby_throne_block.des: Hold a block of ruby—a crown for your vault.
advancement.bmcmod.fossil_fragment.title: Echo of Ancients
advancement.bmcmod.fossil_fragment.descr: Recover Fossil Debris from ancient strata.
advancement.bmcmod.sunwood_skiff.title: Sunwood Sailor
advancement.bmcmod.sunwood_skiff.descrip: Craft a Sunwood boat or chest boat and take to the water.
advancement.bmcmod.essence_sealed.title: Distilled Levels
advancement.bmcmod.essence_sealed.descri: Seal experience into the sealed XP bottle after mastering liquid XP.
advancement.bmcmod.tome_unknown.title: Unread Prophecy
advancement.bmcmod.tome_unknown.descript: Recover an Unknown Book from your questing.
advancement.bmcmod.capture_spirit.title: Soul Snare
advancement.bmcmod.capture_spirit.descri: Hold a Capture Crystal after morph mastery.
advancement.bmcmod.enchanted_stockpile.d: Place or carry an Enchanted Chest—living XP storage.
advancement.bmcmod.witch_veil.title: Witch’s Crown
advancement.bmcmod.witch_veil.descriptio: Don the Witch Hat—couture with curse affinity.
advancement.bmcmod.void_torch_lit.title: Torch of Absence
advancement.bmcmod.void_torch_lit.descri: Light the Void Torch among Nebrith finds.
advancement.bmcmod.forgotten_scrap.title: Forgotten Scrap
advancement.bmcmod.forgotten_scrap.descr: Mine Forgotten Debris for lost-age alloys.
book.bmcmod.welcome.page1:
Thanks for installing Better Minecraft!

Have fun exploring, upgrading your gear, and creating your own adventure.

— Better Minecraft
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.play_failed: Unable to start End Storm. You must be in The End and not already in a storm.
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.play_success_ma: Prepared End Storm level %1$s for %2$s player(s).
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.start_success_m: Started End Storm level %1$s for %2$s player(s).
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.none: No active End Storm to stop.
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.get_none: No End Storm found in range %1$s.
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.get_found: Found End Storm level %1$s in range %2$s.
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.back_success_ma: Moved %1$s player(s) back by one wave.
bmcmod.commands.endstorm.victoryloot_suc: Spawned End Storm victory chest for level %1$s.
gamerule.endStormOnlyEnd: Whether End Storm (potion and raid) may only be started in The End
gamerule.doBossEventSpawn: Whether random miniboss boss events can spawn near players
bmcmod.commands.bossevent.spawn.bad_rari: Unknown rarity "%s". Use: /bmc bossevent spawn <common|uncommon|rare|epic|legendary|mythic> (English subcommand).
bmcmod.commands.bossevent.spawn.need_pla: This command must be run by a player in a world.
bmcmod.config.screen.title: Better Minecraft — settings
bmcmod.config.gamerules.multiplayer_hint: Game rules can only be changed on the server. Ask an operator or use /gamerule if you have permission.
bmcmod.config.server.restart_hint: Gameplay options live in bmcmod-server.toml (world serverconfig on servers). Restart the world or dedicated server after edits. In the NeoForge mod config screen, use reset on an entry to restore its default when available.
bmcmod.config.server.remote_hint: You are on someone else's server: miniboss, trader, and invasion settings come from that server's files. Your local mod config files do not change this world.
bmcmod.commands.help.bossevent: /bmc bossevent spawn <common|uncommon|rare|epic|legendary|mythic> — Force a miniboss near you. Tab lists English names only. Perm. 2. Natural spawns respect gamerule doBossEventSpawn.
message.bmcmod.end_storm.only_end: You can only drink this potion in The End.
message.bmcmod.end_storm.reward_chest: End Storm reward chest spawned at %1$s %2$s %3$s.
